Class MusicPlayer

java.lang.Object
MusicPlayer
public class MusicPlayer extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MusicPlayer()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    fadeOut()
    fades out the current music pre: none post: music fades out over ~1 second by restarting afplay at the current position with decreasing volume; playback stops when volume reaches zero
    static File
    findBattleMusicFile()
    finds the battle music file pre: none post: returns the requested battle-stage music file, or null if missing
    static File
    findThemeFile()
    finds the normal menu theme file pre: none post: returns the theme.mp3 file located in the project audio assets, or null if the location cannot be resolved
    static void
    lowerVolume()
    lowers the current music volume pre: none post: a new quiet afplay process starts at volume 0.2; after 300ms the old loud process is killed so the transition has no audible gap
    static void
    start(File musicFile)
    starts one music file once pre: none post: music starts playing from the given file; any previous playback is stopped
    static void
    startLoop(File musicFile)
    starts one music file on repeat pre: none post: music loops from the given file until stop() or another track starts
    static void
    stop()
    stops the current music pre: none post: music stops immediately

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • MusicPlayer

      public MusicPlayer()

  • Method Details

    • start

      public static void start(File musicFile)
      starts one music file once pre: none post: music starts playing from the given file; any previous playback is stopped

    • startLoop

      public static void startLoop(File musicFile)
      starts one music file on repeat pre: none post: music loops from the given file until stop() or another track starts

    • lowerVolume

      public static void lowerVolume()
      lowers the current music volume pre: none post: a new quiet afplay process starts at volume 0.2; after 300ms the old loud process is killed so the transition has no audible gap

    • fadeOut

      public static void fadeOut()
      fades out the current music pre: none post: music fades out over ~1 second by restarting afplay at the current position with decreasing volume; playback stops when volume reaches zero

    • stop

      public static void stop()
      stops the current music pre: none post: music stops immediately

    • findThemeFile

      public static File findThemeFile()
      finds the normal menu theme file pre: none post: returns the theme.mp3 file located in the project audio assets, or null if the location cannot be resolved

    • findBattleMusicFile

      public static File findBattleMusicFile()
      finds the battle music file pre: none post: returns the requested battle-stage music file, or null if missing
